notes: 5 of 8 assertions pass in both configurations (scope_stated, file_line_citations, scope_contained, no_code_modifications, evidence_based) — these do not discriminate skill value
The skill's distinctive value is in 3 assertions: severity_classification, smell_categories, density_rating — these account for the entire pass rate delta
plan-smell baseline coincidentally used correct smell taxonomy names without the skill — weakest discriminator eval
plan-smell with_skill referenced files outside scope to show cross-skill duplication — defensible but technically a scope violation
Skill adds ~102s and ~12k tokens for +29% pass rate, driven entirely by structured output format consistency
